title: Senior Executive/Manager - Community Care
description:
Purpose of Job

Plays a crucial role in coordinating care services, ensuring high-quality, person-centred care for seniors. This role involves overseeing care planning, coordinating services, engaging with stakeholders, managing community resources, and liaising with a team of care professionals to improve the well-being and social inclusion of seniors in the community.


Key Responsibility Areas

  • Coordinate with Stakeholders to draft processes and workflows to deliver seamless, integrated care for community dwelling seniors.
  • Engage with caregivers, next-of-kin and external stakeholders to enhance community care integration and improve service linkages.
  • Develop and review care plans, workflows, service manuals and communication processes to drive continuous service improvement.
  • Monitor care standards, ensure adherence to SOPs and address escalated issues to maintain high-quality service delivery.
  • Prepare administrative reports aligned with service requirements and programme goals to ensure accountability and transparency.
  • Manage and oversee the coordination of care planning, delivery, and case management processes including psychoeducation, referrals and multidisciplinary interventions for seniors, including regular review of Individual Care Plans (ICPs) to meet evolving needs.
  • Plan, implement and evaluate groupwork sessions and outreach initiatives to support seniors and caregivers.
  • Undertake any additional duties as assigned by the Deputy/Executive Director.


Requirements

Experience:

  • Relevant experience in care co-ordination for seniors for their integrated care in the community.
  • Experience in working with stakeholders in the Eldercare sector.
  • Experience in programme development, evaluation and co-ordination.
  • Experience in inteRAI assessment will be an advantage, as well as case management, groupwork and community engagement.
  • Proven experience in supervising and leading teams to deliver high-quality services

Qualifications:

  • Graduate Diploma, Bachelor's, or Master's degree in Social Work
  • or Nursing or Relevant Allied Health Qualifications

Others:

  • Required travelling for home visits to different locations in service boundary.


Competencies

  • Prior experience in client or patient care, preferably in community or eldercare settings such as nursing homes, active ageing centres, or healthcare institutions.
  • Strong knowledge of care planning, case management, inteRAI and community engagement strategies.
  • Excellent coordination, communication and interpersonal skills to coordinate with various stakeholders.
  • Ability to handle crisis situations, make data-driven decisions, and implement care improvement strategies.
  • Proficient in resource/volunteer management, program evaluation and resource planning.
  • Preferably bilingual and knowledge of dialects will be an added advantage.

postedCompany.description:
FILOS COMMUNITY SERVICES LTD

VISION
To see effective functioning of individuals and families in the community

MISSION
To build resilience and empower individuals and families

VALUES
Faithfulness
Integrity
Love
Openness
Servanthood

SERVICES
Family Life Services
Assistance & Referral Services
Children & Youth Services
Elderly Services

FAMILY LIFE SERVICES aims to build strong ties within familes, fostering communication between parent and child through Family Life Education to Schools, Corporate and Community Organisations.

ASSISTANCE AND REFERRAL SERVICES reaches out to needy individuals and families through Bursary & Scholarship awards, Bread Distribution, Blessing projects during festive season and household assistance in kind. Filos also provides counselling services for individuals, married couples and families.

CHILDREN AND YOUTH SERVICES impart lifeskills to students that will help them in their holistic development, build their resiliency and equip them to cope with the challenges of modern day demands.

ELDERLY SERVICES provides a one-stop, home based preventive health service for elderly living in the community.
postedCompany.name: FILOS COMMUNITY SERVICES LTD.
